PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
    PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAdditiveImpl(EXPRESSION_ADDITIVE)
    PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(+)('+')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
    PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
    PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
    PsiElement(,)(',')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
    PsiElement(,)(',')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
    PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('a')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(=>)('=>')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
        PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''b'')
    PsiElement(,)(',')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('c')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(=>)('=>')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
        PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''d'')
    PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('myClass')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
        PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"string"')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
